title: RaceProgress bin count 200 to 100
summary: Reduce RaceProgress discretization from 200 bins to 100 bins.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Change only the RaceProgress binning resolution from 200 to 100 where that block exists. Keep floor categories, count encoding, target encoding, models, and blend weights unchanged.
expected_effect: Regularize the confirmed binning block with a coarser discretization.
risk: Coarser bins may lose useful strategic timing detail.
